MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-01-2011, PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT THE CASE SETTLED LAST THURSDAY AND DEFENDANT STATED THAT THE CASE IS NOT SETTLED. PLAINTIFF COUNSEL'S CLIENT IS NOT PRESENT SINCE COUNSEL WASN'T AWARE THAT THE CASE IS NOW NOT SETTLED. THE COURT CONTINUED THE CASE TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY ON AUG-08-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206.
